understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to navigate the player to the goal gem '+' by planning horizontal movements and removing obstacles, while avoiding spike hazards and making efficient use of limited moves.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was limited to left and right, followed by automatic falling in the direction of gravity until stopped. Clicks could be used to remove breakable blocks without advancing the move counter. Landing on spikes resulted in instant failure, and undo allowed backtracking from mistakes. Strategic planning using landing previews and corridor scans was essential.
